metadata.description: Post-improvement scorecard comparing before/after Phase C sprints 1-7
metadata.gemini_rationale: S8 suppression is a significant positive step (derived beta, right direction). M_GUT derived from moduli shows predictive intent. But Hubble tension still REFUTED (44-order gap), Lambda has 120-order gap, and alpha from RG is 20% off. Framework improved methodology but remains far from predictive.

assertions.name: E8->Leech->Bridges->Faces chain
assertions.sprint: 1 (alpha_leak now DERIVED from bridge geometry, no longer hardcoded)

assertions.name: h^{1,1}=4 and face grouping
assertions.sprint: 1 (leakage computation improved but structure still not unique)

assertions.name: alpha^-1 formula from G2 geometry
assertions.sprint: 5 (RG path added: alpha_em_inv=165.3, 20.65% off but legitimate chain)

assertions.name: M_GUT and alpha_GUT from G2 geometry
assertions.sprint: 5 (M_GUT=3.96e17 GeV from moduli, no longer hardcoded)

assertions.name: m_higgs = 125.1 GeV from brane partition
assertions.sprint: 6 (component-level status table, m_bulk acknowledged as INPUT)

assertions.name: Speed of light from E8xE8 root lattice
assertions.sprint: 6 (warning added: c=1 in natural units, not derivable)

assertions.name: Lambda from bridge moduli
assertions.sprint: 4 (dynamical Lambda: V_eff = V_bare * exp(-S_Pneuma), no H0 input)

assertions.name: Hubble tension resolution
assertions.sprint: 2 (KNP alignment reduces gap from 47 to 44.5 orders, still fails)

assertions.name: Sampler S^{2,0} entropy dynamics (NEW)
assertions.sprint: 1 (kappa_sampler=2 from dim S^{2,0}, Second Law validated)

key_improvements: S8 suppression: UNFOUNDED -> SPECULATIVE-PROMISING (beta_eff=0.065 DERIVED, S8 from 0.837 to 0.789, within 1.2sigma of KiDS)
Cosmological constant: UNFOUNDED -> SPECULATIVE (dynamical Lambda, non-circular, 120-order gap)
Gauge unification: UNFOUNDED -> PROBLEMATIC (M_GUT derived from moduli, 20x off but legitimate chain)
Higgs: UNFOUNDED -> FITTED (honestly labeled, component status table added)
alpha formula: FITTED + new RG path PLAUSIBLE (alpha_em_inv=165.3, 20.65% off but derivable)
alpha_leak: was hardcoded ratio=6, now DERIVED from bridge geometry
ALL 5 UNFOUNDED assertions eliminated (4 improved, 1 reclassified)
remaining_critical_issues: Hubble tension: STILL REFUTED (KNP reduces gap by 3 orders, 44.5 remain)
Cosmological constant: 120-order gap between V_eff and observed Lambda
M_GUT from moduli: 20x too high (T_min=37.85 insufficient)
alpha from RG: 20.65% off (known missing corrections plausibly close gap)
mass_ratio holonomy_correction: still back-computed from CODATA to 10 sig digits
Fermion generations formula: still NUMEROLOGICAL (not in literature)
Speed of light: still NUMEROLOGICAL (gnostic naming, c=1 in natural units)
dark_energy w0: still RETROFITTED (changed to match DESI)

gemini_score_trajectory.assessment_phase_c: Framework improved methodology significantly (all 5 UNFOUNDED eliminated, new modules with honest derivation chains). S8 mechanism is the strongest concrete improvement.
gemini_score_trajectory.assessment_phase_d: Phase D sampler entropy extensions did NOT improve the score. All 6 attempts classified FITTED or REFUTED. Key finding: exp(-S) is either catastrophically over-suppressive or negligibly small depending on integration range, which is not uniquely determined by topology. The entropy mechanism is a universal exponential that can match anything (FITTED) rather than a genuine derivation (DERIVED).

phase_d_results.sprint_1_hubble: FITTED — entropy damping over-suppresses naively; tuned t=2574 closes gap but integration time not derived
phase_d_results.sprint_2_s8: TUNED — entropy correction 8.2%, numerically irrelevant to S8 (bottleneck is phi_dot_frac not beta)
phase_d_results.sprint_3_lambda: FITTED — 8 G2 formulas for torsion integral, NONE give required 250; value chosen to match Lambda_obs
phase_d_results.sprint_4_gauge: FITTED — KK+entropy gives 2.4% correction; alpha_em improves 222.9->145.2 but still 6% off
phase_d_results.sprint_5_proton_ckm: UNCHANGED — proton entropy 0.009% (negligible), CKM phases average to zero
phase_d_results.sprint_6_higgs: REFUTED — Wilson-line gives 3.4e18 GeV (16 orders off), lambda=1/24 misattributes triality
phase_d_results.meta_conclusion: Sampler entropy S^(2,0) is not the universal gap-closing mechanism the proposals claimed. The exponential exp(-S) has unlimited suppression power but no unique integration range, making it unfalsifiable. Each 'gap closure' amounts to choosing the integration parameter to match the known answer.
